name: mongodb
description: Install MongoDB client tools: mongosh, Database Tools, and optionally Compass.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log} = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\mongodb-verify.log'; mongosh --nodb --eval 'print(version())' | Tee-Object -FilePath ${log} -Append; mongoimport --version | Tee-Object -FilePath ${log} -Append; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\mongodb-smoke.txt') -Value 'ok'"
